channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Immigrants contribute significantly to Australia despite misconceptions
item.description: In this opinion piece, Zoya Patel challenges the narrative pushed by rightwing politicians that immigrants are a threat to Australian jobs, housing, and culture. Patel explains that migration is not a...

item.title: Ugandan Man Dies Suddenly During Sexual Activity in Luuka District
item.description: A tragic incident occurred in Luuka District, Uganda, where a 50-year-old man, Simon Kalamu, collapsed and died during an intimate encounter with a woman in a bush. According to police, the man became...

item.title: Bruce Springsteen supports Stephen Colbert amid show cancellation controversy
item.description: Bruce Springsteen publicly expressed his support for Stephen Colbert during the host’s penultimate episode of Late Night on 20 May 2026. The Boss described Colbert as “the first man in America who los...

item.title: Toronto driver cleared of red light violation after 18-year appeal due to inadequate trial process
item.description: A Toronto driver, Neville Greene, successfully appealed a red light ticket nearly 18 years after being convicted. Greene was initially charged in 2007 for allegedly failing to stop at a red light at S...

item.title: All Gaza-bound flotilla activists, including Saad Edhi, freed from Israeli detention
item.description: All activists involved in the recent Global Sumud and Freedom Flotilla missions heading to Gaza have been released from Israel's Ktziot prison and are being deported, according to human rights organis...

item.title: Ex-Union Minister Shanta Kumar highlights governance challenges in managing stray animals
item.description: Former Himachal Pradesh Chief Minister and ex-Union Minister Shanta Kumar has expressed serious concerns over the growing problem of stray animals in India, particularly dogs and cows. Speaking from D...

item.title: Prime Minister mediates and settles decades-old land dispute in Rombo, Kilimanjaro
item.description: Tanzania’s Prime Minister, Mwigulu Nchemba, has successfully mediated a resolution to a land dispute in Rombo District, Kilimanjaro Region, that lasted over 51 years. The disagreement involved Mtimhoo...

item.title: UN Court to Clarify Workers’ Right to Strike
item.description: The International Court of Justice (ICJ), the United Nations’ top judicial body, is scheduled to release an advisory opinion on the legal right of employees to strike. This follows a 2023 request from...

item.title: ANTA confirms Kyrie Irving’s Southeast Asia visit, Philippine inclusion unclear
item.description: Global sportswear brand ANTA has officially announced that NBA star Kyrie Irving will be returning to Southeast Asia for promotional events and basketball-related activities. While the announcement co...

item.title: Bangsamoro Chief Minister Takes Temporary Control of BARMM Education Ministry Amid Audit Concerns
item.description: COTABATO CITY, Philippines — On May 20, 2026, Bangsamoro Chief Minister Abdulrauf Macacua assumed temporary control of the Ministry of Basic, Higher and Technical Education-BARMM (MBHTE-BARMM) followi...

item.title: Senator Hontiveros calls on Dela Rosa to cooperate with ICC authorities
item.description: Senator Risa Hontiveros has publicly urged Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa to respect the rule of law and cooperate with authorities following the Department of Justice's directive to implement the In...

item.title: A Look at The Elks Magazine Covers from the 1920s
item.description: The Elks Magazine, established in 1922, has served as the official publication for the Benevolent and Protective Order of Elks, connecting the national organization with its members across the United ...

item.title: iCaur 03T electric SUV launches in South Africa with dual-motor AWD option
item.description: Chery's sub-brand iCaur has officially launched its 03T electric SUV in South Africa, sitting above the V23 in the brand's lineup. The 03T features a bold, geometric design with squared-off proportion...

item.title: Wes Streeting Proposes Capital Gains Reform and Wealth Tax as Part of Labour Leadership Bid
item.description: Former Health Secretary Wes Streeting has outlined a significant policy proposal as he positions himself for a potential Labour leadership contest. He has called for reforms to capital gains tax, sugg...

item.title: Zia Adiong Named Spokesperson for VP Sara Duterte Impeachment Prosecution Panel
item.description: MANILA, Philippines – As the impeachment trial against Vice President Sara Duterte approaches, the House prosecution panel has intensified its preparations. Among the recent updates, Zia Alonto Adiong...

item.title: Death of Congolese man in Dublin sparks calls for investigation into security restraint
item.description: Outrage has emerged in Ireland following the death of Yves Sakila, a Congolese-born man, who was restrained by security personnel outside a department store in Dublin last Friday. Reports indicate tha...

item.title: Effective Strategies for Supporting Employees During Medical Leave
item.description: Serious health issues, whether a car accident, cancer, or mental health crisis, can turn daily life upside down, making work seem overwhelming. For employees, medical leave can be a crucial lifeline, ...

item.title: Australia backs UN resolution urging accountability for fossil fuel emissions
item.description: Australia has voted in favour of a landmark United Nations resolution aimed at holding countries accountable for climate change. The resolution, pushed by Pacific island nations and supported by a gro...

item.title: High Court ruling highlights pension fraud and procedural failures in TSC
item.description: A legal case between the Teachers Service Commission (TSC) and a former senior pensions officer has brought to light fraudulent activities in Kenya's pension system. The High Court reviewed claims tha...

item.title: ‘Drishyam 3’ review: Mohanlal elevates a family drama weighed down by dated visuals
item.description: In 'Drishyam 3', the Malayalam superstar Mohanlal reprises his role as Georgekutty, a man whose criminal past continues to affect his family. The film focuses heavily on family dynamics, particularly ...
